strap: Belfast Maritime Net Zero draws £547m of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,687 grants, anchored by Queen'S University Belfast (47%), Agri-Food And Biosciences Institute (16%), with Department For The Economy (Ni) on the industrial side. 11 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £50m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — repeated infrastructure commitments reinforce incumbent positions rather than redirecting capability toward new anchors or sub-domain specialisms.
